steps.title: Get Your Free Quote
steps.description: Use our AI-based tool to get a detailed quote immediately.  Later we can guide you through SEAI grants and available funding.

steps.title: Free Site Survey
steps.description: Our experts visit your property to assess your roof, energy usage, and design the perfect system for your home.

steps.title: Professional Installation
steps.description: Our own qualified team handles the full installation — no sub-contracting. Clean, tidy, on time, and on budget.

title: How It Works
subtitle: We handle everything — from paperwork and grants to installation and setup!
